name: Emith Arachchi
intro: I build scalable full-stack applications with strong backend architecture, efficient data processing, and clean, modern user interfaces.
about: Software Engineering undergraduate at Sri Lanka Institute of Information Technology (SLIIT) with hands-on experience developing financial data processing systems and backend automation tools at National Savings Bank. Strong in backend engineering using Node.js, Python, and .NET Core MVC, with practical experience handling banking transaction systems such as SLIPS, CEFT, and Lanka Clear. Experienced in building reconciliation engines, high-performance data pipelines, and automation tools for large-scale financial datasets. Skilled in database management, system reliability, and performance optimization for mission-critical applications. Also passionate about full-stack development using MERN stack, building scalable web applications with clean UI/UX and production-ready architecture.
